positive: A highly detailed, stylized minimalist abstract composition featuring a central mountain range silhouette at sunset. The scene uses strong contrasting colors: deep indigo and sapphire blue for the sky gradient, contrasting sharply with rich burnt orange, gold, and pale teal for the stylized, geometrically simplified mountains. Incorporate abstract celestial elements like stylized crescent moons and scattered constellations. The overall aesthetic must be clean, high-contrast, suitable for screen printing on fabric, with smooth gradients and crisp vector-like lines. Central, symmetrical composition, flat illustration style, graphic novel quality, ethereal, highly detailed, high resolution.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, gradient bleed, asymmetrical, low contrast, messy, photorealistic, 3d rendering, extra limbs, bad anatomy
